title: i want to create checkboxes inside updates using monday.com API, is it posiible or is there any way to do it, interactive checkboxes.
excerpt: i want to create checkboxes inside updates using monday.com API, is it possible or is there any way to do it, interactive checkboxes.

posts.author: Ashutosh (Ashutosh Tiwari)
posts.cookedHtml: i want to create checkboxes inside updates using monday.com API, is it possible or is there any way to do it, interactive checkboxes.

posts.author: Billchenau (Bill)
posts.cookedHtml:
hey @Ashutosh

Bill here Welcome to the Community!

At this stage, it’s not possible to add checkboxes into the updates via the API.

It’s only possible to add it from the UI at the moment.

Cheers,
Bill
